title: Tick 3: session-start hook with background dispatch and sentinel guard (queue item A5)
question: Does the outcomes-mcp repo now ship a SessionStart hook that adds zero perceptible blocking latency to a session start and writes a one-screen orientation to /tmp via a forked background child?
success_criteria: claude settings json registers a SessionStart hook with matcher startup only so resume is free
scripts session-start sh forks a background child and returns immediately with sentinel guard preventing duplicate runs
runroc A5-latency txt shows five measured runs of the hook all under one hundred milliseconds blocking

capabilities: settings json registers SessionStart matcher startup so resume is free of latency
session-start sh forks background child and returns immediately under one hundred milliseconds
sentinel guard at tmp prevents duplicate runs within the same session pid
